body.title: Post-result output validation hook in BaseShim
body.result: validate_output() on BaseShim: PII/blocklist redaction with WARNING log; devices/policy/ OutputPolicy+OutputValidator; TYPE_CHECKING import keeps substrate portable
body.description:
Complement to T-shim-policy-gate. After a tool call returns but before the result is delivered to the calling agent, run the result through a validation hook. V1 checks: PII pattern detection (email, phone, SSN patterns); content policy (configurable blocklist per agent profile). Failed validation redacts the sensitive content and logs the incident — does not block delivery by default (configurable per policy).

Scraps already validates ticket content. Same pattern generalized to any agent output passing through any shim.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/skeleton/base_shim.py (post-result hook), devices/policy/ (validation rules), devices/scraps/validators.py (reuse PII patterns)
**Design rules:** BaseDevice/BaseShim; reuse scraps validators rather than duplicating
**Scope boundary:** IN — PII detection, content blocklist, redaction + incident log; OUT — semantic content evaluation (that is the evaluator device), blocking delivery by default
**Completion criteria:** a tool result containing an email address is redacted before delivery to the caller; incident logged; existing tool calls with clean output unaffected
